title: Deterministic compilers canonical serialization and schema evolution
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Canonical UTF-8 bytes content hashes immutable compiler/config identity declared IR dependencies and one atomic manifest govern all projections.
acceptance_evidence: golden cross-context hash tests and atomic manifest tests

title: Duplicate authoritative truth across artifacts
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Every generated value is an IR projection with source-node paths; manual generated-view edits never become authority.

title: Compile sharded human-readable specifications
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Compile the exact eight bounded Markdown shards from the canonical IR while preserving governed status and links.
acceptance_evidence: human shard inventory content and source-node tests

title: Compile OpenSpec as a governed view
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Compile change schema-view and implementation-governance JSON projections that name source IR/compiler hashes and remain non-authoritative.
acceptance_evidence: OpenSpec view inventory and drift tests

title: Compile machine artifacts from the same IR
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Compile ten non-executable machine projections for registry contracts graphs skills evaluation repair dashboard fixture traceability and implementation-ticket views.
acceptance_evidence: machine inventory cross-artifact and source-node tests

title: Protect generated authoritative artifacts from silent manual drift
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Validate artifact bytes against the manifest; quarantine altered views and emit a drift report without changing IR.
acceptance_evidence: manual mutation quarantine and IR non-mutation tests

title: Bind artifacts to compiler and source hashes
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Every artifact and manifest records IR hash source-node set compiler ID/version config hash reproducible generation timestamp and content hash.

title: Single-source generation
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Human OpenSpec and machine views are projections of one HarnessIR and contain no independently maintained semantic values.

title: Deterministic replay
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Identical IR compiler version and reproducible build config produce byte-identical artifacts manifest and receipt in fresh contexts.

title: Idempotent compilation
bounded_ST_03_04_interpretation: Repeat command and compilation key return the same manifest and receipt without duplicate events.
